title: senecio vagus
intro: Senecio vagus, also known as woolly senecio, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The plant contains toxic compounds called alkaloids and pyrrolizidine esters, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. These properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic effects, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as skin irritations, wounds, and internal parasites. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, but caution should be exercised due to its toxic nature, and it should be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
